title: podman stats fails loading cgroup
body:
See reproducer below:

```
[libpod (analyses)]$ ./bin/podman run --rm -d alpine top                                                                                        
a0cbe7ff2302118dff43f5715b7c22beb40393b53e40c81446f7997976184115                                                                                
[libpod (analyses)]$ ./bin/podman ps                                                                                                            
CONTAINER ID  IMAGE                            COMMAND  CREATED         STATUS             PORTS  NAMES                                         
a0cbe7ff2302  docker.io/library/alpine:latest  top      3 seconds ago   Up 2 seconds ago          crazy_cori                                                             
[libpod (analyses)]$ ./bin/podman stats -l                                                                                                      
Error: unable to load cgroup at /libpod_parent/libpod-a0cbe7ff2302118dff43f5715b7c22beb40393b53e40c81446f7997976184115: cgroups: cgroup deleted 
```

@giuseppe, can you take a look? I am currently performing the bloat analysis and found that by chance.

comments.body:
it is not supposed to work as rootless with cgroups v1, unless the cgroups are configured to be writeable.

It will work with cgroups v2 and the systemd manager, with cgroupfs it will still require a custom configuration.

Said so, the error message could be nicer :-)
this looks fixed to me? closing ... reopen if needed
